whoIsFelix:
Felix Windriyareksa Hardyan is an AI Engineer and Data Scientist focused on computer vision, applied NLP, multi-agent frameworks, and advanced retrieval-augmented generation (RAG).

He is currently an IT Intern (ML & Data Science) at PT Astra Visteon Indonesia and a part-time AI Engineer at HPC Universitas Gunadarma. He specializes in designing and building end-to-end machine learning pipelines and production-ready applications.
featuredProjects:
Here are Felix's top featured projects:

  • InvenioAI: Enterprise document intelligence platform enabling semantic search and question answering using advanced hybrid retrieval (Qdrant + BM25), FastAPI, LangChain, LlamaParse, and Docker.
  • Omnius: Media intelligence platform utilizing LLM-powered multi-agent flows (Pydantic AI, Llama 3.3, Qwen3) on Microsoft Azure to perform automated news retrieval, framing, bias, and sentiment analysis.
  • LUCIAN: Lung cancer histopathology classification system using ConvNeXt-Base, achieving 93.67% accuracy with Grad-CAM visual explainability for diagnostic support.
technicalSkills:
Felix's systematic technical capability matrix:

  • Programming & Data: Python, SQL, TypeScript, FastAPI, Pandas, NumPy, REST APIs, React, Git & GitHub
  • AI & Machine Learning: Advanced RAG, AI Agents, Deep Learning, Computer Vision, Natural Language Processing, LLMs & GenAI, Prompt Engineering, PEFT & QLoRA, Anomaly Detection
  • Frameworks & Tools: PyTorch, TensorFlow, scikit-learn, LangChain, Pydantic AI, LlamaIndex & LlamaParse, Qdrant, FAISS, Hugging Face
  • Cloud & MLOps: Docker, Microsoft Azure, Google Cloud (GCP), MLOps Pipelines, CI/CD, NVIDIA DGX Systems
bangkitAcademy:
Felix completed the Machine Learning Specialization at Bangkit Academy (backed by Google, GoTo, and Traveloka) in 2024, graduating with Distinction.

His training centered heavily on mathematics for ML, computer vision architectures, advanced transformers, and robust machine learning pipeline engineering.
